news.news: Genentech and Roche presented new long-term safety and biomarker data for trontinemab, an investigational Brainshuttle bispecific antibody, at the Alzheimer's Association International Conference. The company also revealed the design of the Phase III PrevenTRON study to investigate the drug in preclinical Alzheimer's disease.

The European Commission granted marketing authorization for TEPKINLY (epcoritamab), a bispecific antibody, in combination with lenalidomide and rituximab for the treatment of relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma. The approval is based on Phase 3 EPCORE FL-1 trial data showing significant improvement in progression-free survival.
